strategy: Hit with Storm (+30%); Bison resists Myth 80%.
Self-blade only. Any Blade cast on another Wizard is Disarmed by Ms. Felicity, and any Trap is Cleanse Warded by her. Buff the hitter with self-blades and hit fast.
Avoid Auras. Kenny Rooster answers each Aura with a 300 Fire Natural Attack that also destroys the Aura.
Expect confusion: Bison confuses each Wizard for 2 Rounds on Round 1 and periodically. Don't rely on precise turn timing.
Attacking Bison triggers Psycho Deflection, his Natural Attack taking 20% of your max health. Keep healed and end him quickly once set up.
cheatNotes: Joining late gets you confused for 2 Rounds.
On Round 1, and periodically after, Bison confuses every Wizard for 2 Rounds. Plan for scrambled turns.
Attacking Bison makes him counter with his Natural Attack for 20% of your max health. Stay healed.
Ms. Felicity Disarms any Blade cast on another Wizard. Use self-blades only.
Ms. Felicity Cleanse Wards any Trap you place on its target. Traps are wasted here.
When Kenny Rooster drops below ~20% health, Ms. Felicity expels him from the duel.
Daniel McCoil hands every Wizard a Snake Oil card on Round 1 and every 5 Rounds.
When Ms. Felicity drops below ~20% health, Daniel McCoil expels her from the duel.
Any Aura you cast makes Kenny Rooster hit for 300 Fire and destroy the Aura. Skip auras.
When Daniel McCoil drops below ~20% health, Kenny Rooster expels him from the duel.
